parameters.query:
SELECT
  -- Enrolment stats
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrolments) AS total_enrolments,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrolments WHERE completed_at IS NOT NULL) AS completed_enrolments,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM enrolments) AS unique_learners,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM enrolments WHERE completed_at IS NOT NULL) AS learners_completed_a_course,

  -- Active learners (progress in last 7 days)
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM progress WHERE completed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS active_learners_7d,

  -- Completion rate
  ROUND(
    100.0 * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrolments WHERE completed_at IS NOT NULL)
    / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrolments), 0), 1
  ) AS completion_rate_pct,

  -- Certificates
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM certificates) AS total_certificates,

  -- Top courses by enrolment
  (
    SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
      'course', c.title,
      'code', c.code,
      'enrolments', cnt,
      'completions', compl
    ) ORDER BY cnt DESC)
    FROM (
      SELECT
        e.course_id,
        COUNT(*) AS cnt,
        COUNT(e.completed_at) AS compl
      FROM enrolments e
      GROUP BY e.course_id
      LIMIT 5
    ) t
    JOIN courses c ON c.id = t.course_id
  ) AS top_courses,

  -- Modules completed today
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM progress WHERE completed_at::date = CURRENT_DATE) AS modules_completed_today,

  -- New enrolments this week
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrolments WHERE enrolled_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS new_enrolments_7d;
